title: Subquery: seats still available for showtime 1
prompt_md: Which seats for showtime 1 are still free? Return the `label` of every seat belonging to `showtime_id = 1` whose `id` is **not** among the `seat_id` values already booked. Use a subquery with `NOT IN`. Sort the results by `label` ascending.
starter_code:
SELECT label
FROM seats
WHERE showtime_id = 1
  AND id NOT IN (SELECT seat_id FROM bookings)
ORDER BY label;
hints: The inner query `SELECT seat_id FROM bookings` lists every seat that has been booked.
`id NOT IN (...)` keeps only seats that are not in that booked list.
Filter to `showtime_id = 1` and finish with `ORDER BY label`.
reference_solution: SELECT label FROM seats WHERE showtime_id = 1 AND id NOT IN (SELECT seat_id FROM bookings) ORDER BY label;
